run_summary: Screen 1 faces a large basket (6 flags from the same Anthropic Fable trigger) with mixed threat profiles. Four open positions from this trigger are already held; two new flags (HCAT, AMBA at confidence 3) warrant exploratory entry only. The Fable catalyst is a cybersecurity model with minimal/no overlap to most holdings, supporting sympathy-fade thesis, but three of six flags have baseline threat ('minimal'), not 'none'—basket rule applies strictly.

entries.name: Health Catalyst, Inc
entries.catalyst: Anthropic releases Fable model with strict guardrails, drawing cybersecurity researcher pushback
entries.thesis: Anthropic Fable is a cybersecurity model with no overlap with HIPAA-bound provider data warehousing and EHR-integrated analytics. However, HCAT has real idiosyncratic stress (Project Nexus 9% RIF in Q2 2026, DOS-to-Ignite migration churn) that means this move could partly reflect ongoing fundamental concerns rather than pure sympathy.
entries.what_kills: The 10-Q explicitly flags continuing DOS-Ignite churn and revenue decline — if a sell-side note tied today's move to fundamentals rather than the Fable headline, the 'sympathy fade' read is wrong.
entries.reasoning: Confidence 3 (at minimum threshold), threat_assessment 'minimal', panic_calibration 'unjustified'. However, filings flag material idiosyncratic stress (Project Nexus 9% RIF in Q2 2026, DOS-to-Ignite migration churn, ongoing revenue decline). The 6.43% single-day move may partly reflect fundamentals, not pure Fable sympathy. Risk of thesis invalidation is non-trivial; requires sell-side confirmation that move is catalyst-driven before entry. BASKET RULE applies (6 flags from Fable trigger); default to exploratory if BUYing, but idiosyncratic risk argues for WATCH first.

entries.name: Ambarella, Inc.
entries.catalyst: Anthropic releases Fable model with strict guardrails, drawing cybersecurity researcher pushback
entries.thesis: Ambarella is an edge-AI inference beneficiary, and Fable is a cloud cybersecurity LLM with no edge-inference overlap. The curation note ('direct AI beneficiary') is supported. However, AMBA already had a weak 5-day tape, so part of this is broader semis fade, not pure Fable sympathy.
entries.what_kills: The K explicitly flags NVIDIA, Qualcomm, Mobileye as competitors with greater resources in automotive AI — a competitive release from one of those (not Anthropic) would be the real threat. Also customer concentration (WT = ~70% of revenue, Insta360 large end-customer) is a real fundamental risk.
entries.reasoning: Confidence 3, threat_assessment 'minimal'. Already held at cost 69.81, now flagged at current 65.8. BASKET RULE applies (6 flags from Fable trigger, including AMBA). NEW flag data shows confidence 3 (down-flagged from initial 4 purchase confidence), and position still underwater. Filings support beneficiary thesis (AI edge inference), but broader semis fade may continue. No additional entry warranted; monitor for recovery. If confidence had been 4 and threat 'none', would be exploratory ADD, but Screen 1 does not support ADD (fixed window discipline). WATCH and hold existing position.
